meaning: n.印度(南亚国家),南亚次大陆(即印巴次大陆,简称次大陆,含印度、巴基斯坦、孟加拉国、尼泊尔、不丹、锡金等国)
examples: The tiger is native to India.
She had lately returned from India.
Business tycoon Ratan Tata and a former chief justice of India are serving, too.
In this sense, India, China, Dubai and Mexico may be not imitators as much as harbingers.
